headline: Barclays Says GE Vernova (GEV) Among Best Positioned for 800VDC Technology
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the 10 Best Energy Stocks Capitalizing on the Data Center Boom. On June 9, Barclays cited GE Vernova as one of the companies best positioned for the 800VDC technology, according to a report by Investing.com. While acknowledging that GE Vernova currently has limited white-space exposure, the analyst emphasized […]
